mapper.select:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A1.PROGRM_KOREAN_NM ) AS RNUM , A1.* FROM ( SELECT COALESCE( PROGRM_FILE_NM , '' ) AS PROGRM_FILE_NM , COALESCE( PROGRM_STRE_PATH , '' ) AS PROGRM_STRE_PATH , COALESCE( PROGRM_KOREAN_NM , '' ) AS PROGRM_KOREAN_NM , COALESCE( PROGRM_DC , '' ) AS PROGRM_DC , COALESCE( URL , '' ) AS URL FROM LETTNPROGRMLIST WHERE 1=1
AND PROGRM_FILE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND PROGRM_STRE_PATH LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND PROGRM_KOREAN_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND PROGRM_DC LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND URL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND PROGRM_FILE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filterProgrmFileNm}, '%')
AND PROGRM_STRE_PATH LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filterProgrmStrePath}, '%')
AND PROGRM_KOREAN_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filterProgrmKoreanNm}, '%')
AND URL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filterUrl}, '%')
) A1 LIMIT #{lengthPage} OFFSET #{startIndex}

SELECT COUNT(1) AS LIST_CNT FROM ( SELECT PROGRM_FILE_NM FROM LETTNPROGRMLIST WHERE 1=1
AND PROGRM_FILE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND PROGRM_STRE_PATH LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND PROGRM_KOREAN_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND PROGRM_DC LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND URL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND PROGRM_FILE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filterProgrmFileNm}, '%')
AND PROGRM_STRE_PATH LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filterProgrmStrePath}, '%')
AND PROGRM_KOREAN_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filterProgrmKoreanNm}, '%')
AND URL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filterUrl}, '%')
) A1

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A1.PROGRM_KOREAN_NM ) AS RNUM , A1.* FROM ( SELECT COALESCE( PROGRM_FILE_NM , '' ) AS PROGRM_FILE_NM , COALESCE( PROGRM_STRE_PATH , '' ) AS PROGRM_STRE_PATH , COALESCE( PROGRM_KOREAN_NM , '' ) AS PROGRM_KOREAN_NM , COALESCE( PROGRM_DC , '' ) AS PROGRM_DC , COALESCE( URL , '' ) AS URL FROM LETTNPROGRMLIST WHERE 1=1
AND PROGRM_FILE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND PROGRM_STRE_PATH LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND PROGRM_KOREAN_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND PROGRM_DC LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND URL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND PROGRM_FILE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filterProgrmFileNm}, '%')
AND PROGRM_STRE_PATH LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filterProgrmStrePath}, '%')
AND PROGRM_KOREAN_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filterProgrmKoreanNm}, '%')
AND URL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filterUrl}, '%')
) A1

SELECT COALESCE( PROGRM_FILE_NM , '' ) AS PROGRM_FILE_NM , COALESCE( PROGRM_STRE_PATH , '' ) AS PROGRM_STRE_PATH , COALESCE( PROGRM_KOREAN_NM , '' ) AS PROGRM_KOREAN_NM , COALESCE( PROGRM_DC , '' ) AS PROGRM_DC , COALESCE( URL , '' ) AS URL FROM LETTNPROGRMLIST WHERE PROGRM_FILE_NM = #{progrmFileNm}
